payload.answer: I can help, but “the thing from yesterday” is too vague to identify a durable memory safely. Please choose how you’d like to proceed.
repair_options: Ask a clarifying question about what specific event, item, or topic from yesterday you mean.
Provide a short description or keyword so I can generate a precise memory candidate.
List a few possible things from yesterday and I can help disambiguate among them.
If you want, keep it as an unresolved note rather than committing any memory yet.
